---
title: "Patterns of recreational substance use, help seeking and harm reduction among UK music festival attendees"
authors: "Rayner, C. L., Davies, J., Bradshaw, C. A., & Jones, A. L."
year: 2025
date: 2025-01-01
pub-journal: "Drug Science, Policy and Law"
volume: "11"
pages: "1–12"
doi: "10.1177/20503245251371721"
pdf: "assets/papers/2025/rayner2025.pdf"
categories: [other]
---
